name: Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip
lore:
Lore of Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip
                                    


Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip Zip is the watchman and messenger of the aliens. He is tasked with awakening humans to sahur. His debut was on March 10, 2025. The account that created this Indonesian character was @noxaasht. He is the friend of Anatoxich who is sounding like Minje from KickFlip and was seen in a Video comment.
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Zip zip zip zip zip zip zip zip, inilah utusan para alien, ia bertugas membangunkan manusia untuk sahur, ia setiap hari turun 3.00 subuh, biasanya berbunyi zip zip, zip zip, konon katanya, kalau tidak bangun saat ada Suara itu akan diangktan ke galaksi lain.Dulu teman abang dek yang tidak bangun sahur saat ada Suara ini, besoknya hilang. Heeeeei takutnya. tolong bapak-bapak dan ibu-ibu share video ini agar tidak ke rumah anda.
Translated (English)
Zip zip zip zip zip zip zip zip, this is the messenger of the aliens, he is tasked with waking humans up for sahur, he goes down every day at 3:00 in the morning, usually making a sound of zip zip, zip zip, it is said that if you don't wake up when there is this Sound, you will be transported to another galaxy. In the past, my friend who didn't wake up for sahur when there was this Sound, disappeared the next day. Heeeeei, I'm scared. Please, ladies and gentlemen, share this video so that it doesn't come to your house.
